plugins.name: firefox-devtools-mcp
plugins.description: Control Firefox for browsing, web testing, and debugging. Fill forms, capture network and console activity, take screenshots, run scripts, and profile performance. Supports Android devices.

plugins.name: firefox-devtools-troubleshoot
plugins.description: Diagnose and fix Firefox DevTools MCP setup issues. Use this if the firefox-devtools-mcp plugin is not working.
